differentials.name: tortuous pelvic veins
differentials.raw: tortuous pelvic veins (blood flow at Doppler imaging)

context: high-SI of fluid on T1WI ← proteinaceous fluid (DDx: hemorrhage) | incomplete longitudinal folds = partially effaced mucosal / submucosal plicae | absence of peritoneal spill | dilated ampullary portion of tube (visualization of mucosal folds confirm intratubal
